entities.name: virgin wax
entities.raw_quote: "Take virgin wax, rendered virginal by art [ceram virgineam, arte virginizatam ]..."

entities.name: hairs (of woman)
entities.raw_quote: "the master must obtain hairs from the woman he wishes to seduce..."

entities.name: red bristles
entities.raw_quote: "three bristles of red hair, and you should have with you a knife with a white handle..."

entities.name: white-handled knife
entities.raw_quote: "a knife with a white handle made for this purpose"

entities.name: needles (9 or 13)

attributes.quantity: nine in main experiment, thirteen in Greek parallel

entities.raw_quote: "fix the needles in the image... nine needles made by an experienced craftsman"

entities.raw_quote: "go to a fruit-bearing tree, and the master should make a circle"

entities.raw_quote: "a circle, which is simple in form but important in its effects..."

entities.name: burning coals

entities.name: shoulderblade (animal)

entities.raw_quote: "this shoulderblade should be from an ass, a hare, a goose or a capon..."

entities.name: white thorn wood
entities.raw_quote: "seek out wood from a white thorn or wood floating on water, and make fire with it"

entities.name: rib bone

attributes.use: inscribe Bel/Ebal names and burn for erotic compulsion

entities.raw_quote: "writing the names of the ‘infernal spirits’ Bel and Ebal on a rib..."

entities.name: Liber de angelis
entities.raw_quote: "the blood of a dove must be used here — and a dove must be offered as sacrifice in the amatory experiment from the Liber de angelis..."

entities.name: On the Secret Arts of the Imaginary Art
entities.raw_quote: "this experiment was taken [from the book] On the Secret Arts of the Imaginary Art, [from the book] On the Flowers of All Experiments"

entities.name: Greek magical papyrus
entities.raw_quote: "resembles a procedure well known in antiquity and described in a Greek magical papyrus..."

relationships.from: On the Secret Arts of the Imaginary Art

summary: This chunk details two main erotic magic experiments from the Munich Handbook (CLM 849): Experiment 12 uses wax image-making with angelic/demonic invocations (Belial, Astaroth, Paymon), timing under planetary hours (Venus/Jove/Mars/Sun/Saturn), and piercing with needles to compel love; Experiment 13 involves inscribing spirit names on animal shoulderblades or ribs and heating them in fire while conjuring infernal spirits (Asyel, Castiel, Bel, Ebal) to constrain or incite a person’s will through symbolic burning. The text also references parallels in ancient Greek magic, Picatrix, and other medieval sources.
key_passages: "Thou, Belial, and thou Astaroth, and thou, Paymon, be my helpers in this undertaking."

"Just as this needle is fixed in the heart of this image, so may the love of N. be fixed to the love of N., so that she cannot sleep, wake, lie down, sleep, [or] walk until she burns with love of me."
"Asyel, Castiel, Lamisniel, Rabam, Erlain, [and] Belam, I command you..."

"writing the names of the ‘infernal spirits’ Bel and Ebal on a rib, and in between his own name and that of the woman he wishes to seduce. Then he burns the rib, and when it is hot he should conjure Bel and Ebal not to rest until they cause the woman’s heart to burn..."
"the experiment was taken [from the book] On the Secret Arts of the Imaginary Art, [from the book] On the Flowers of All Experiments"
